results.title: Create New Configurable Product in Admin Catalog
results.notes: Product 'QA Test Configurable Product' (SKU: QA-CONFIG-TEST-001) created in Configurable products catalog.

results.title: Add Configuration Section to Configurable Product
results.notes: Section 'QA Test Options' of type Product added successfully.

results.title: Add Option Products to Configuration Section
results.notes: Two options (Seat, Pedals) added to QA Test Options section.

results.title: Set and Update Option Price and Quantity
results.notes: Quantity updated to 3. Option pricing is NOT managed at configuration level -- it is inherited from the product's pricing in the Pricing module. No price field exists in the option detail blade.

results.title: Mark Configuration Section as Required and Verify Storefront Enforcement
results.notes: Section marked as required successfully. Storefront verification BLOCKED -- product catalog (7f840fe0) not linked to B2B store catalog (fc596540). Admin-side verification PASS.

results.title: Edit Existing Configuration Option Price and Verify on Storefront
results.notes: No price field exists in option configuration detail. Pricing is managed through the Pricing module, not configuration. Test adapted to verify this architectural behavior.

results.title: Add Second Configuration Section to Existing Configurable Product
results.notes: Second section 'QA Color Options' (type: Product) added. Both sections visible in configuration grid.

results.title: Remove Option Product from Configuration Section
results.notes: Pedals option removed from QA Test Options. Section shows Options: 1 (Seat remains).

results.title: Delete Entire Configuration Section from Configurable Product
results.notes: QA Color Options section deleted. Only QA Test Options remains in configuration.

results.title: Publish and Activate Configurable Product -- Verify Storefront Visibility
results.notes: Admin side PASS: product activated, API confirms isActive=true. Storefront BLOCKED: product catalog (7f840fe0) differs from B2B store catalog (fc596540). Product will never appear on storefront.

results.title: Validation Error When Creating Configuration Section with Empty Name
results.notes: Save button disabled when section name is empty AND type is unselected. Both fields are required for Save to become enabled.

results.title: Duplicate Configuration Section Name Behavior
results.notes: System allows duplicate section names without validation error or crash. Both sections saved and visible in grid. No uniqueness constraint enforced.

results.title: Edit Configurable Product Name and Verify Update on Storefront
results.notes: BLOCKED: Requires storefront visibility. Product catalog not linked to B2B store.

results.title: View Configured Orders in Admin Order Management
results.notes: BLOCKED: Requires a configured product order placed on storefront. No storefront purchase possible due to catalog-store linkage issue.

results.title: Delete Configurable Product from Admin and Verify Storefront Removal
results.notes: Product deleted successfully. Admin grid shows 7 items (was 8). API GET returns 404 confirming deletion. Storefront verification skipped (catalog not linked to store).

results.title: Save Configuration with Product Section Having No Predefined Options -- IsActive Preserved
results.notes: PR #873 verification. POST /api/catalog/products/configurations with Product-type section and empty options[] returned HTTP 200 with isActive=true. IsActive NOT silently reset to false. Fix confirmed working.

results.title: Admin UI Active Toggle Not Blocked When Product Section Has No Options
results.notes: PR #873 verification. Added 'PR873 Test No Options' section (Product type, 0 options) to Bike product. Enable configuration toggle remained ON after save and reload. Toggle not silently reset by $watch. Fix confirmed working in Admin UI.

results.title: Save Configuration with No Sections -- IsActive Forced to False
results.notes: POST with isActive=true and sections=[] returned HTTP 200 with isActive=false. Empty-sections guard correctly forces isActive to false. This is the ONLY condition that forces IsActive to false (per PR #873).

completed: PR873 Test No Options section removed from Bike product configuration
Bike product configuration saved back to original 4-section state
QA Test Configurable Product (3806a223-335b-4484-b026-def14ff44556) deleted from catalog
residual: Blanket product (f35b3373) has minimal configuration created via API (isActive=true, 1 Product section, 0 options) -- no DELETE endpoint available
Buttercreme product (3f8b99a1) has minimal configuration created via API -- no DELETE endpoint available
Foam mattress product (f2218658) has empty configuration (isActive=false, 0 sections) -- no DELETE endpoint available

blockers.description: Configurable products catalog (7f840fe0) is not linked to B2B store catalog (fc596540). Test products in this catalog never appear on the storefront.
blockers.recommendation: Link configurable products catalog to the B2B store, or create test products in the B2B-linked catalog
